response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with over two decades of experience and strong software craftsmanship skills, his resume lacks any mention of growth engineering, experimentation platforms, telemetry, or statistical data analysis. For a Principal-level (IC6) role focused specifically on architecting experimentation frameworks and feature-flighting systems, deep domain expertise is typically required, making him a poor fit for this specific position despite his solid technical foundation.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (20+ years) with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
Proven experience building scalable microservices and high-throughput systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP), aligning with the AI-first requirement.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure.
No evidence of data analysis, statistical methods, or telemetry infrastructure design, which are core responsibilities of this role.
No background in growth engineering or building unified measurement systems across multiple product surfaces.
